_meta.purpose: Reference fixture — exact wire shape FE+1 should expect from POST /api/projects/:projectId/requirements/:reqId/test-cases/generate. Generated 2026-05-09 (Day-14 TASK B1) via ComposerService OFFLINE path (no Groq key needed). Once Day-15 deploy sets LLM_PRIMARY_PROVIDER=groq + GROQ_API_KEY on Render, the wire shape is identical except (a) `cases[].title/preconditions/steps/expectedResult/rationale` will be model-generated (not canned), (b) `llmMetadata.tokensIn/tokensOut/latencyMs` will reflect real Groq usage, (c) `stubbed: false`. Schema lock is enforced by ADR-013 + packages/shared/src/schemas/test-case.ts ComposerGenerateResponse Zod schema.

cases.title: Refund flow within 7 days — happy path — primary user flow
cases.preconditions: User authenticated; relevant entity in valid state.

stepsJson.action: Navigate to the screen described by RET-247
Trigger the primary action under test

cases.expectedResult: Primary flow described by RET-247 completes successfully.
cases.rationale: Covers the core happy-path described in the requirement. Highest-value first case per testing pyramid.

cases.title: Refund flow within 7 days — invalid input — validation error
cases.preconditions: User authenticated; entity in valid pre-state.

stepsJson.action: Verify FE renders error inline next to the field
stepsJson.expected: Error message visible; submit button stays disabled.

cases.expectedResult: Invalid input is rejected at both client + server; user sees actionable error.
cases.rationale: Validation errors are the most common user-facing failure mode. Covers both layers of defense.

cases.title: Refund flow within 7 days — cross-workspace isolation guard
cases.preconditions: Two workspaces with overlapping entity IDs.

stepsJson.action: User in workspace A attempts to fetch entity from workspace B
Verify response body is opaque (no entity-existence leak)
stepsJson.expected: 404 message is generic; no metadata leaked.

cases.expectedResult: Cross-workspace access denied with no existence leak (mirrors M2 isolation pattern).
cases.rationale: Multi-tenant isolation is the highest-risk security control. Canon: 404 not 403 on cross-tenant.

cases.title: Refund flow within 7 days — audit log integrity
cases.preconditions: User performs the action under test.

stepsJson.action: Trigger the action that should write an audit row
stepsJson.expected: Audit row written synchronously with HMAC chain link.
Chain integrity verified; no tampered or skipped rows.

cases.expectedResult: Action emits a chain-bound audit row; verifier accepts the chain.
cases.rationale: Hard Rule 7: every state-changing action writes audit_log. Verifier must re-run clean.

cases.title: Refund flow within 7 days — rate-limit + retry behavior
cases.preconditions: Rate limiter configured; user has no quota remaining.

stepsJson.action: Attempt the action when over rate limit

cases.expectedResult: Rate limit returns 429 with backoff hint; retry succeeds within window.
cases.rationale: Rate limiting protects free-tier quotas; tests both the limit + the recovery path.

503_retry_exhausted.message: Composer could not generate test cases — all providers exhausted.
503_retry_exhausted.run_id: <UUID of failed TB-022 row, recorded BEFORE throw for audit>

400_zod_validation_failure.message: <Zod issue path + message — e.g. count: Number must be less than or equal to 10>
400_zod_validation_failure._note: Fires before LLM call. ComposerGenerateRequest Zod parse runs at the controller surface.

404_requirement_not_found.message: requirement <UUID> not found in this project
404_requirement_not_found._note: Cross-workspace OR cross-project reqId — uniform 404 (no existence leak).

403_stakeholder_role.message: Stakeholder role is read-only on test case generation

_streaming_mode: NON-STREAMING. Single JSON response after model completes. F16a/b should show a loading spinner for the full 1-3s generation window. ADR-013 §Consequences explicitly rejects streaming for this surface — modal renders all cases at once.
